title: Miniml Hand Soap Wash Liquid 5L Refill - Pink Grapefruit & Aloe Vera Scented Eco Friendly Hand Washing Liquid for Soft and Sensitive Skin Care - 100% Vegan & Cruelty Free
features: ✅ PERFECT FOR SENSITIVE HANDS: Cleanse your hands with a non-toxic formula infused with pink grapefruit and aloe vera. This naturally derived soap helps eliminate stubborn smells while leaving your hands feeling soft, clean, and fresh.

✅ PINK GRAPEFRUIT & ALOE VERA FRAGRANCE: Enjoy the invigorating scent of pink grapefruit and aloe vera, providing a fresh and uplifting wash. Our cruelty-free formula is gentle on the skin and smells amazing.
✅ ECO-FRIENDLY & PURE: Free from sulfates, parabens, and harsh chemicals. Our vegan hand wash is biodegradable and effective in both hard and soft water.

✅ ZERO WASTE: Our sustainable solutions go far beyond your purchase; refill your forever bottles with this 5 litre refill; the empty packaging from refills can be returned to our factory to be cleaned, reused and refilled; scan the QR code on the back of our refills to arrange a return so it can be reused again and again
description: Product Description Bring luxury touches into your bathroom with this Pink Grapefruit & Aloe Vera Hand Soap. This naturally derived, gel hand soap eliminates stubborn smells and leaves hands feeling soft and clean, even after multiple washes. What’s not to love? Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Read label before use. Store closed and out of direct sunlight.
